title: White Balloons 100 Pack 12 Inch Thicken Latex White Helium balloon With 2 Rolls of Balloon Ribbon Romantic Balloon Party Decorations for Birthday Wedding Engagement Baby Shower Festival Decor Supplies
features: WHAT YOU GET：Includes 100pcs 12-inch Strong Balloons, 2 rolls of balloon ribbon（65FT）,These white balloons weigh 2.8 grams each, Enough quantity can meet your daily life, festival or party decoration needs.

【High quality materials】The white Party balloons have been rigorously tested and are made of high-quality natural latex material, durable and no stange smell, not easy to burst or deflate, safe to be used for both kids and adults.

【Perfect Party Decorations】These white latex balloons are Perfect for birthday parties, Wedding, achelorette party, New Year's Eve Party, indoor or outdoor decoration and festival. The white balloons could make any dull space full of vitality and joy.

【Support Helium&Air】These matte white balloons can be filled with helium to float or filled with air to stick on walls, ceilings, doorways and anywhere else you want to decorate. Also use with other colours of balloons to create a beautiful balloon arch or multiple balloon bouquets, Enjoy a fun DIY time with your family.

【Attention & warning】Please DO NOT overfill the latex balloons, and also avoid sunburn, overheat, pointed object and excessive friction. Due to automatic packing system, please kindly note that any holes or popped balloons within 1-3 pcs for 100 pack balloons is a normal phenomenon, Any questions for the balloons, please feel free to contact us and we will do our best to help you solve the problem.
description: Product Description White represents purity, happiness, and joy, adding unlimited fun to your party The white balloons is the best choice for your different theme party.
